Package org.eventb.core

Interface IPRProofInfoElement

All Known Subinterfaces:
IPRProof, IPSStatus
All Known Implementing Classes:
EventBProofElement, PRHypAction, PRProof, PRProofRule, PRRuleAntecedent, PSStatus
public interface IPRProofInfoElement
This interface contains getter and setter methods for internal elements that record and cache proof information.

More concrete interpretations of the values stored in the attributes can be found in the interfaces that extend this interface.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IPRProof
  • IPSStatus
  • EventBProofElement

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getConfidence()
    Returns the confidence attribute associated to this internal element.
    boolean
    getHasManualProof()
    Returns the manual proof attribute associated to this internal element.
    void
    setConfidence(int confidence, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Sets the confidence attribute associated to this internal element.
    void
    setHasManualProof(boolean value, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Sets the manual proof attribute associated to this internal element.

  • Method Details

    • getConfidence

      int getConfidence() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the confidence attribute associated to this internal element. If the confidence attribute is not present, this method returns IConfidence.UNATTEMPTED.
      Returns:
      the value of the confidence attribute, or IConfidence.UNATTEMPTED in case it is not present.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • setConfidence

      void setConfidence(int confidence, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the confidence attribute associated to this internal element.

      In case the value to set is IConfidence.UNATTEMPTED, the attribute is removed. This means that the only values of this attribute that can occur are those not equal to IConfidence.UNATTEMPTED, this value being encoded as the absence of this attribute.

      Parameters:
      confidence - The confidence to set this attribute to
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getHasManualProof

      boolean getHasManualProof() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the manual proof attribute associated to this internal element. If this attribute is not present, this method returns false.
      Returns:
      the value of the manual proof attribute, or false in case it is not present.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • setHasManualProof

      void setHasManualProof(boolean value, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the manual proof attribute associated to this internal element.

      In case the value to set is false, the attribute is removed. This means that the only value of this attribute that can occur is true, false being encoded as the absence of this attribute.

      Parameters:
      value - The value to set this attribute to
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
